note: Suggested runtime interface methods for compliant implementations. These methods should load from the Standards Package — not from hard-coded application logic.

methods.description: Load and verify the Standards Package. Verifies checksum. If version omitted, loads latest.
Returns the seven admission tests with pass conditions.
Returns core controlled-vocabulary tag families. Must not be mutated at user or client level.
Returns required and additional metadata fields for claim records.
Returns the source anchor schema fields.
Returns domain modules from the consolidated domain module table. Optionally filtered by sector.
Returns validation rules for claim records and .intel packages.
Returns controlled sector vocabulary, forbidden labels, and remap table.
Returns tag synonym mappings for controlled vocabulary normalization.
